title: Emissive Ores Compatibility
description: Emmisive ore textures for as much mods as possible
body:
Simple resource pack that adds glowing to material parts of the ores. 
Made to be compatible with some of the mods

### Important info:
- This mod requires any form of Optifine's format emissive textures (Continuity, Optifine, ect.)
- It supports not all mods (see below)
- Some servers might recognize this as unfair advantage, use it use it at your own risk


<details>
<summary>List of supported mods</summary>

- BetterNether
- BetterEnd
- Create
- Deeper And Darker
- Jewelry
- Progression Reborn
- Spectrum
- Werewolves
- Ad Astra
- The Aether
- Cobblemon
- Deep Aether
- Immersive Engineering
- Malum
- Mekanism
- Tinkers Construct

<details>
<summary>Planned (NYI) mods</summary>

- Thermal Foundation
- GregTech
- EvilCraft
- Mystical Agriculture

</details>



</details>
